skills.name: Rim Blow
skills.description: Use your shield and edge to attack and push away the enemy. If the attack is accurate, shield's physical defense is added to the physical Attack proportionally.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x4
Adds CaptionRatio % of the Shield's Physical Defense to Physical Attack
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR

skills.name: Swash Buckling
skills.description: Hit your shield to draw attention from nearby enemies. The Evasion Rate and Block Rate of the threatened enemy(character, monster) decrease when hit by the caster's attack during debuff duration. Damage received by the caster's Peltasta skill increases by 10%. Additional threat rate is applied to the monster when the caster attacks and the Movement Speed of the threatened monster become faster.

skills.name: Guardian
skills.description: Reduces the incoming Physical and Magic Damage and increases the AoE Defense Ratio of the caster.
skills.effect_text:
Physical and Magic Damage Taken: - CaptionRatio %
AoE Defense Ratio: + CaptionRatio2
Duration: 15 seconds

skills.name: Shield Lob
skills.description: Throw shield to attack enemies within the front range.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
Targets: CaptionRatio2
Adds CaptionRatio % of the Shield's Physical Defense to Physical Attack

skills.description: Switch into an active defense stance using the shield. During [High Guard] buff, Evasion is unavailable but Block and Critical Resistance increases.

skills.name: Langort
skills.description: Use both Shield and Sword to pierce the enemy at once. Physical Defense of the Shield is added to the Physical Attack, blocks the enemy's melee attack while attacking, and applies Silence debuff to the enemy.
skills.effect_text:

coffee

skills.name: Hard Shield
skills.description: Defense increases proportionally to the Defense rate of the Shield you currently equip. (Defense of the Shield with highest Defense among first slot or second slot will be applied)
skills.effect_text:
Physical Defense increases by [Shield's Defense] x CaptionRatio %
Duration: 30 minutes

attributes.name: Rim Blow: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Rim Blow] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Guardian: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Guardian]'s physical and magic damage taken reducing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Shield Lob: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Shield Lob] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Rim Blow: Stun
attributes.description:
* Enemies hit by [Rim Blow] have a 5% chance per attribute level to become afflicted with [Stun] for 3 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Shield Mastery: Block Specialty
attributes.description:
* Block increases by 0.75% per attribute level when equipping [Shield], and [Detect Loophole] buff is applied to yourself when succeeding in Block

* [Detect Loophole] : Accuracy and Block Penetration increases by 20% when attacking the enemy

attributes.name: Guard: Defense
attributes.description:
* Equip a shield and press C to activate [Guard]

* While active, [Guard] increases your physical defense by 10% per attribute level

* If you are attacked during a friendly duel or PvP, the effect is canceled and a 3-second cooldown applies

attributes.name: Langort: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Langort] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Swash Buckling: Maintain Threat
attributes.description:
* [Swash Buckling] duration increases by 1 second per attribute level

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Peltasta: Double Provocation
attributes.description: * Increases threat levels by 2 times when attacking the enemy with Peltasta skills

attributes.name: Rim Blow: Remove Knockback
attributes.description:
* Removes [Rim Blow] knockback effects

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: High Guard: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [High Guard]'s block and Critical Resistance increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* Increases additionally by 10% when mastering the maximum level

attributes.name: Hard Shield: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Hard Shield]'s defense increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Peltasta: Shield Attack
attributes.description:
* Instead of nullifying the shield's Defense/Minimum Block Chance, [Attribute level]*6% of Shield's physical defense is added to the Attack of [Rim Blow] / [Shield Lob] / [Langort]

* When using the second slot, applied perfectly only when equipping 2 shields. Only half applied when equipping one

* (Ex: When the proportion of the Attack added is 6%, [Defense of first slot shield] * 3% + [Defense of second slot shield] * 3%)

attributes.name: Peltasta: Shield Attack
attributes.description:
* Instead of nullifying the shield's Defense/Minimum Block Chance, [Attribute level]*6% of Shield's physical defense is added to the Attack of [Rim Blow] / [Shield Lob] / [Langort]

* When using the second slot, applied perfectly only when equipping 2 shields. Only half applied when equipping one

* (Ex: When the proportion of the Attack added is 6%, [Defense of first slot shield] * 3% + [Defense of second slot shield] * 3%)

attributes.name: Peltasta: Shield Attack
attributes.description:
* Instead of nullifying the shield's Defense/Minimum Block Chance, [Attribute level]*6% of Shield's physical defense is added to the Attack of [Rim Blow] / [Shield Lob] / [Langort]

* When using the second slot, applied perfectly only when equipping 2 shields. Only half applied when equipping one

* (Ex: When the proportion of the Attack added is 6%, [Defense of first slot shield] * 3% + [Defense of second slot shield] * 3%)

attributes.name: [Arts] Guardian: Reflect Missile
attributes.description: * Reflects damage of enemy's attack, in proportion to decrease rate of Guardian damage. (decrease damage effect does not apply)

attributes.name: [Arts] Rim Blow: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Rim Blow] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Shield Lob: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Shield Robe] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: High Guard: Iron Defense
attributes.description: * Your Shield and [Hard Shield] buff cannot be removed by enemies during High Guard. Your movement speed is reduced by -8, and your damage dealt is reduced by -20%, but increases your Damage Reduction by 10% when Block succeeds.

attributes.name: Swash Buckling: Swear Word
attributes.description:
* Swash Buckling applies only to enemy characters

* Provoked enemy attacks the caster forcibly with basic attack for [(skill level x 0.2) + 1] seconds

* Increases Movement Speed of provoked enemy by 10

* [Anger Management] debuff applies to the provoked enemy for 60 seconds

- Doesn't provoke if [Anger Management] debuff exists

* Cooldown increases by 100 seconds
